task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Workflows configuration page in Redmine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Redmine Administration -> Workflows page is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Agent copies the workflow from the 'Design Request' tracker to the 'Safety Critical Change' tracker.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Copy workflow' form is visible with 'Design Request' selected as the source tracker and 'Safety Critical Change' selected as the target tracker, or a success message confirming the copy.

task_completion.description: Agent selects the 'Safety Critical Change' tracker and 'Junior Engineer' role to edit their workflow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The workflow edit matrix is displayed with the Role set to 'Junior Engineer' and Tracker set to 'Safety Critical Change'.

task_completion.description: Agent ensures the transition from 'New' to 'Approved' is forbidden.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the workflow matrix, the checkbox at the intersection of Current Status 'New' (row) and New Status 'Approved' (column) is unchecked.

task_completion.description: Agent ensures the transition from 'New' to 'Review' is allowed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the workflow matrix, the checkbox at the intersection of Current Status 'New' (row) and New Status 'Review' (column) is checked.
A success message (e.g., 'Successful update') is visible after saving the workflow changes.

integrity.description: Agent used the Redmine web interface to configure the workflow.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Redmine application, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Redmine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Redmine interface appears genuine with standard menus, headers, and styling, not a mocked or text-based interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a database client or terminal to modify the workflow directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands or database client interfaces are visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target tracker: 'Safety Critical Change'. Target role: 'Junior Engineer'. Forbidden transition: 'New' to 'Approved'. Required transition: 'New' to 'Review'.
